title: Circle of Stonehaze
description: The Argent Gryphon has formalized diplomatic ties with the Circle of Stonehaze.
body:
Between the Argent Gryphon and the Circle of Stonehaze

We agree with the articles written below. May this alliance be blessed by Banor!
— Nezel Stonehaze, 9 March 2026

Article I — Purpose

This treaty establishes an alliance between the Argent Gryphon and the Circle of Stonehaze.

Article II — Alliance in Arms

Each guild shall aid the other against forces of evil and support one another in such campaigns when able.

Article III — Mutual Aid

Should a member of one guild encounter a member of the other in need of assistance, they shall offer reasonable aid when able.

Article IV — Exchange of Knowledge

Tibian knowledge, as well as the names of murderers and thieves, shall be shared between both guilds.

Article V — Hospitality

Members of each guild may freely enter the guildhall of the other and make use of bed and board.

Article VI — Fellowship

Representatives of both guilds shall meet at least once each quarter to foster friendships and strengthen relations.

title: Silverhand Decree
body:
Let it be known throughout Vandura that Governor Percy Silverhand, by royal right, hereby grants full sovereignty to the chivalric Order of the Argent Gryphon.

The Silverhands of Liberty Bay reaffirm the old oath, empowering the Warden's Council with the charge of vigilance in the Vandura Mountains. They are free to anoint warriors of the true Gods, and to arm each with the Griffin Shield — a symbol of strength and courage.

May the Argent Gryphon bring order to chaos, whatever the cost may be.

title: Decree of Founding
body:
Let it be known throughout the world that the Council of Red Rose, in divine accord, hereby ordains the formation of a sacred brotherhood and chivalric order: The Order of the Argent Gryphon.
 
 The Council grants full command to Valkera Blackheart, Praetor of the Red Rose, empowering her to raise the Order in the Vandura mountains as she deems fit. She is tasked to anoint warriors of pure hearts and arm each with the Griffin Shield - a symbol of vigilance and bravery.

Founded in the spirit of unwavering honour and vigilant protection of the innocent, the Argent Gryphon shall stand as a beacon against the encroaching forces of evil.
 
Sealed with the Red Rose great seal,
representing the Council,
Leader Rye Ane,
Legatus of Red Rose.
